Discuss Hakurei Shrine Reitaisai 9 / 博麗神社例大祭（第9回） / Hakurei Shrine Reitaisai 9 May 27, 2012
博麗神社例大祭（第9回） / Hakurei Shrine Reitaisai 9 / 博麗神社例大祭（第9回）
Back to Browse Events
The Hakurei Shrine Reitaisai (博麗神社例大祭) is an annual convention held in Japan to officially release demo and full versions of Touhou games. Fan works are also released at the event.
Reitaisai 9 will be held in Tokyo Big Sight (Tokyo International Exhibition Center) on May 27, 2012. Official website: http://www.reitaisai.com/
